summary: Verified bug fix for Wareneingang form Enter key behavior. All 5 test cases passed - scanner-induced Enter key now moves focus through SN→IMEI→MAC fields before adding item.
critical_code_review_comments: handleSNKeyDown (lines 194-203): Correctly prevents default Enter behavior and moves focus to IMEI input via data-testid selector
handleIMEIKeyDown (lines 206-213): Correctly prevents default Enter behavior and moves focus to MAC input
handleMACKeyDown (lines 217-222): Correctly calls addIntakeItem() when Enter is pressed on MAC field, completing the workflow
All input fields have correct data-testid attributes and onKeyDown handlers attached (lines 459-518)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wareneingang form Enter key bug fix verified. Form now correctly handles barcode scanner Enter key by moving focus SN→IMEI→MAC→Add instead of immediately submitting.

features_tested.TEST 1 - SN Enter moves focus to IMEI: PASS - After entering SN 'TEST-SN-12345' and pressing Enter, document.activeElement.getAttribute('data-testid') returned 'imei-input'
features_tested.TEST 2 - IMEI Enter moves focus to MAC: PASS - After entering IMEI '123456789012345' and pressing Enter, document.activeElement.getAttribute('data-testid') returned 'mac-input'
features_tested.TEST 3 - MAC Enter adds item to list: PASS - After entering MAC '00:11:22:33:44:55' and pressing Enter, item appeared in 'Zu erfassende Geräte' list
features_tested.TEST 4 - IMEI and MAC displayed in list: PASS - Both IMEI (123456789012345) and MAC (00:11:22:33:44:55) values correctly displayed in table columns
features_tested.TEST 5 - Add button still works: PASS - Manual click on 'Hinzufügen' button successfully added second item 'TEST-SN-67890' to list

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Barcode scanner sends Enter after scanning SN, which immediately called addIntakeItem() - user could not enter IMEI or MAC
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: onKeyPress changed to onKeyDown, handleSNKeyDown now moves focus to IMEI instead of adding item
